title: Amazon CEO takes aim at Nvidia, Intel, Starlink, more in annual shareholder letter

title: Final 2 days to save up to $500 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 ticket
description: Ticket discounts of up to $500 will end tomorrow, April 10, at 11:59 p.m. PT. After that, prices for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 go up again. Miss this, and you’ll be paying more for the same access to one of the most anticipated tech epicenters of the year. Register now to lock in these savings.

title: Is fake grass a bad idea? The AstroTurf wars are far from over.
description: A rare warm spell in January melted enough snow to uncover Cornell University’s newest athletic field, built for field hockey. title: Desalination technology, by the numbers

title: This AI Wearable From Ex-Apple Engineers Looks Like an iPod Shuffle

title: Mustafa Suleyman: AI development won’t hit a wall anytime soon—here’s why
